Clark County, NV Senior Living Facilities

12 senior living communities in Clark County, Nevada, organized by city.

Boulder City, NV

  • Lakeview Terrace of Boulder City

    Boulder City, NV

    • Assisted Living
    • Memory Care
    • Respite Care

    Assisted living and memory care community on a hilltop in Boulder City, one of the few licensed senior living options in town.

Henderson, NV

  • Sunrise of Henderson

    Henderson, NV

    • Assisted Living
    • Memory Care
    • Respite Care

  • Vista Pointe at Mira Loma

    Henderson, NV

    • Assisted Living
    • Memory Care

    • Independent Living

  • Golden Villa Care Home

    Las Vegas, NV · Small home

    • Assisted Living
    • Memory Care

  • Las Ventanas at Summerlin

    Las Vegas, NV

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
